name: Locator / Element Not Found
description: Element locator did not match any element on the page. Inspect the page and update the PageObject.

name: Navigation / URL Error
description: Page URL could not be resolved or loaded. Check the URL in testData.

name: Assertion Failure
description: Test assertion did not match expected value. Check expected vs actual in test data or assertions.

name: Timeout Error
description: Action or navigation exceeded the configured timeout. Page may be slow or element not present.

name: Import / Module Error
description: Module import failed. Check relative paths follow ../PageObject/ and ../testData/ convention.

name: Authentication Error
description: Login or authentication step failed. Verify credentials in testData.

name: Skipped Tests
description: Tests marked as test.skip — waiting for real application URL or feature implementation.

name: Unknown / Other Failures
description: Unclassified failure. Review the test output manually.
